text:
For scheduling and leave queries:
• Annual leave application → apply via the HR self-service portal, then inform your Ward Manager
• Shift swap → contact your Nurse Manager directly to get it approved and documented
• Leave balance or entitlements → log in to the HR self-service portal
• Confirmed leave dates → share your details and I'll generate a leave confirmation, send it to your email, and add it to your calendar

Tell me what you need and I'll help where I can.
